Brown Emo Chained Tie + White Cross Collar delivers sharp alt-core style with a bold contrast. Featuring a sleek brown tie accented with hanging chains and paired with a crisp white collar marked by a striking cross detail, this accessory blends emo, goth, and punk fashion into one fierce statement piece.

Dripping in 2000s luxury, the Gold 2000s Luxury McBling Gyaru Necklace Knuckle is the ultimate trendsetter piece. Imagine stepping out of a pink leopard-print limo, paparazzi flashes bouncing off your vintage glam statement necklace. The bold brass knuckle charm exudes attitude, while the shimmering diamond and twinkling star catch the light, radiating pure McBling energy. Channeling the fierce, over-the-top aesthetic of Y2K icons, this piece is made for those who dare to sparkle, shine, and rule the scene with unapologetic glamour.

items.name: ⚙️ Obsidian Drifter Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Wander the ruins in style with the Obsidian Drifter Coat, a battle-worn trench infused with futuristic grit. Its dark metallic finish and rugged silhouette make it perfect for those who live on the edge of chaos and technology.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Matte-black metallic texture with weathered details
⚙️ Heavy layered design for a strong and tactical presence
✨ PBR materials add depth, realism, and shine
🔩 Ideal for mercenaries, pilots, or cyberpunk outlaws
🔍 Keywords: black, coat, cyberpunk, rogue, trench, futuristic, armor, drifter, PBR, Roblox
Rule the night, roam the wastelands —
the Obsidian Drifter Coat is your armor of survival. 🌑
